securityConfiguration.description: Security configuration for ML model loading in Qobuzarr

trustedModels.description: Alternative naming for personal ML model

addingNewModel: 1. Build and sign your ML model assembly
2. Calculate SHA-256 hash: certutil -hashfile YourModel.dll SHA256
3. Update this configuration file with the hash
5. Use UpdateTrustedHash method or update this file directly
6. Place model in one of the allowed directories
7. Restart Qobuzarr to load the new model
securityBestPractices: Always verify model source before trusting
Keep this configuration file secure and version controlled
Monitor audit logs for suspicious activity
Regularly update trusted hashes when models are updated
Use strong naming for production models
Enable signature validation in production environments
Limit model file size to prevent resource exhaustion
Implement regular security reviews of loaded models
